data.content:
Here's a summary of the implementation:

### Files created/modified

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `TicketClassifier.csproj` | Added `Microsoft.ML 4.0.2` + CSV copy-to-output |
| `Program.cs` | Registers `TicketClassifierService` as singleton |
| `Models/TicketData.cs` | ML.NET input/output schemas |
| `Models/TicketRequest.cs` | API request DTO |
| `Models/PredictionResult.cs` | API response with confidence scores |
| `Models/EvaluationResult.cs` | Metrics DTO |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | Trains SDCA Maximum Entropy model on startup, provides prediction + evaluation |
| `Controllers/TicketsController.cs` | `POST /api/tickets/classify` and `GET /api/tickets/metrics` |

### Pipeline
Text featurization (Subject + Description) → concatenate with Priority → normalize → SDCA Maximum Entropy multiclass classifier → map key back to label.

### Endpoints
- **`POST /api/tickets/classify`** — accepts `{subject, description, priority}`, returns predicted category + per-class confidence scores
- **`GET /api/tickets/metrics`** — returns macro/micro accuracy, log-loss, log-loss reduction, and training sample count
